commands.name: download
commands.description: Downloads the provided release version & platform.

options.name: --runtime
options.description:
Indicate the version specified is the runtime
version, NOT the SDK version.

options.name: --platform
options.description:
The platform to download for. Defaults to the
current platform on Windows and MacOS.

options.name: --no-hash-validation
options.description: Indicate that validation of hash should NOT be done.

arguments.name: VERSION
arguments.description:
'active', 'go-live', 'preview' or a specific
version. (Default: 'active')
Default value is: active.

options.name: --available
options.description:
List SDKs available to download; default is to list
installed SDKs.

options.name: --release-type
options.description:
Show available versions matching the specified release
types.
Allowed values are: sts, lts.

options.name: --support-phase
options.description:
Show available versions matching the specified support
phases.
Allowed values are: preview, go-live, active, maintenance,
eol.

options.name: --all
options.description:
Show all available versions including all support phases
and release types.

arguments.name: FILTER
arguments.description:
Filters list to only SDKs starting with the provided
string.

commands.name: set
commands.description:
Creates a global.json to switch to the specified .NET Core SDK
version
Run 'dotnet-sdk [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.
